zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice De La Hyde Lady於1260年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾拉可頓時，她的父親Robert De Hyde of Norbury41歲，母親Cecily Waleran24歲。她於1271年與Robert de Everingham II在英國萊希斯特斯爾加索普結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1326年4月1日在她的家鄉享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice De La Hyde Lady于1260年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾拉可頓时，她的父亲Robert De Hyde of Norbury41岁，母亲Cecily Waleran24岁。她于1271年与Robert de Everingham II在英国萊希斯特斯爾加索普结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1326年4月1日在她的家乡享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: La
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Hyde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or other of various places so called in Bedfordshire, Cheshire, Hampshire, and Middlesex. They were named with Old English hīd ‘hide (of land)’, a variable measure of land, differing from place to place and time to time, and seems to have been originally fixed as the amount necessary to support one (extended) family (Old English hīgan, hīwan ‘household’). The surname may also be topographic for someone living on (and farming) a hide of land. The Hyde family has been in Leinster, Ireland, since the early 13th century and one family has been established in the county of Cork since the 16th century. The name was Gaelicized as both Dalaithíd and de hÍde. Compare Hyder .

variants.name: Dollarhide
meanings: Irish: possibly an altered form of de la Hyde (see Hyde ), which was a prominent surname in Leinster from medieval times onward. Compare Dollahite .

History: Francis Dollahide, born c. 1650–60 in County Dublin, Ireland, was the ancestor of Americans with the surname Dollahide, Dollahite, and Dollarhide. In 1680 he was transported to MD for some youthful misdemeanor. He appears to have been an educated man and rose to be an important landowner and politician, serving in the Lower House of the MD legislature as an elected representative for Baltimore County from c. 1705 to 1721.

variants.name: Hyder
meanings: English (Kent and Sussex): status name or topographic name for one who lived on or possessed a hide of land, from Middle English hide + the locative suffix -er. This is a characteristically southeastern English name, synonymous with Middle English atte hide elsewhere (see Hyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Alice De La Hyde Lady was born in 1260, in Laxton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert De Hyde of Norbury, was 41 and her mother, Cecily Waleran, was 24. She married Robert de Everingham II in 1271, in Garthorpe, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 1 April 1326, in her hometown, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice De La Hyde Lady est née en 1260, à Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert De Hyde of Norbury, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Cecily Waleran, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Robert d’Everingham II en 1271, à Garthorpe, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 1 avril 1326, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice De La Hyde Lady 1260 in Laxton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert De Hyde of Norbury 41 und ihre Mutter Cecily Waleran 24. Sie hat 1271 in Garthorpe, Leicestershire, England Robert de Everingham II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 1. April 1326 im Alter von 66 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice De La Hyde Lady è nata il nel 1260 nel Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert De Hyde of Norbury, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Cecily Waleran, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Everingham II nel 1271, nel Garthorpe, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 1 aprile 1326, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice De La Hyde Ladyが1260年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアラクストンで生まれた時，父Robert De Hyde of Norburyは41歳，母Cecily Waleranは24歳であった。1271年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアガーソルペでRobert de Everingham IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1326年4月1日に故郷で66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice De La Hyde Lady(이)가 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 라스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert De Hyde of Norbury(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecily Waleran(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1271년 영국 레이스스터실르 가소에서 Robert de Everingham II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1326년 4월 1일 그녀의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice De La Hyde Lady nasceu em 1260, em Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert De Hyde of Norbury, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Waleran, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Everingham II em 1271, em Garthorpe, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1 de abril de 1326, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice De La Hyde Lady родилась в 1260 г. в местности лакстон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert De Hyde of Norbury было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Cecily Waleran, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Everingham II в 1271 г. в местности гартаурп, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 1 апреля 1326 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice De La Hyde Lady nació en 1260, en Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert De Hyde of Norbury, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Cecily Waleran, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Robert de Everingham II en 1271, en Garthorpe, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 1 de abril de 1326, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años.
